subject: Run Haskell ingest and fix FxTypedFx.hs
description:
Run cabal run ingest on the exported trace. Fix any unsupported ops in FxTypedFx.hs. Key areas to check:
- RoPE handling (may need pattern matching for interleaved variant)
- MQA attention with 2 groups
- SwiGLU activation (chunk + silu pattern)
- RMSNorm (should work if Llama is supported)
